notableEvents.label: Wade Meckler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Wade Meckler singles on a line drive to center fielder Sam Haggerty. Oswald Peraza to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell hit by pitch. Jorge Soler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza grounds into a force out, fielded by second baseman Justin Foscue. Donovan Walton scores. Jo Adell out at 2nd. Oswald Peraza to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Justin Foscue.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza grounds into a force out, fielded by second baseman Justin Foscue. Donovan Walton scores. Jo Adell out at 2nd. Oswald Peraza to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Justin Foscue.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson grounds out, second baseman Adam Frazier to first baseman Vaughn Grissom.

notableEvents.label: Alejandro Osuna pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Osuna singles on a line drive to left fielder Wade Meckler.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza grounds into a force out, fielded by second baseman Justin Foscue. Donovan Walton scores. Jo Adell out at 2nd. Oswald Peraza to 1st. Throwing error by second baseman Justin Foscue.
